# Midtown Marketplace

> Midtown Marketplace is a 24,000 square foot indoor flea market and antique mall located at 800 Hobson Ave in Hot Springs, Arkansas. Spread across two floors (12,000 sq ft upstairs alone), the marketplace specializes in antiques, collectibles, WW1 and WW2 military memorabilia, mid-century modern furniture, vintage furniture, and rare coins. Open six days a week with hundreds of vendor booths. Awarded "Good Neighbor Business of the Month" by the Hot Springs Chamber of Commerce in March 2026. 5.0 stars on Google. Owner's tagline: "If you can't find it here, you probably don't want it."

## Visit

- **Address:** 800 Hobson Ave, Hot Springs, AR 71913
- **Phone:** (501) 655-9377
- **Google Maps:** https://maps.app.goo.gl/C1WuQxaosrs2DuF1A
- **Facebook:** https://www.facebook.com/p/Midtown-MarketPlace-Hot-Springs-Arkansas-61573039200847/
- **Coordinates:** 34.4983099, -93.0678412

## Hours

- Sunday: 12:00 PM – 5:00 PM
- Monday: Closed
- Tuesday: 10:00 AM – 5:00 PM
- Wednesday: 10:00 AM – 5:00 PM
- Thursday: 10:00 AM – 5:00 PM
- Friday: 10:00 AM – 5:00 PM
- Saturday: 11:30 AM – 6:00 PM

## What's inside

Specialties:

- **Antiques** — grandfather clocks, leather horse statues, ship models, vintage cash registers, brass fixtures
- **Collectibles** — Pokémon cards, Magic: The Gathering, Hot Wheels, Matchbox cars, vintage DC comics, KISS figures
- **WW1 & WW2 Memorabilia** — US Air Force medals, military uniforms, helmets, field gear, German and Japanese war relics (also buying)
- **Mid-Century Modern** — lamps, lounge chairs, dressers, decor from the warm-wood era
- **Furniture** — farmhouse to formal, real-wood antique dressers, dining tables, sideboards
- **Coins** — pennies, nickels, dimes, quarters, mint sets, currency, and rarities for serious collectors

Also found inside: vintage clothing booths, designer handbags (Prada and others), board games, ceramic spice jars, hand-painted teacups, vintage toys, framed art, and hundreds more curated booths.

## Recognition

- **5.0 stars on Google** — see all reviews at https://maps.app.goo.gl/C1WuQxaosrs2DuF1A
- **Good Neighbor Business of the Month — March 2026** awarded by the Hot Springs Chamber of Commerce

## For vendors

Booth space is available, especially upstairs (12,000 sq ft of space). Sizes from 4×10 to 10×10, plus glass showcases. Call (501) 655-9377 to inquire — no online forms.

## About

Midtown Marketplace is locally owned and operated, serving Hot Springs, Hot Springs National Park, Garland County, and surrounding central Arkansas communities. The 24,000 square foot indoor location is air-conditioned year-round.
